ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-20-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jennifer Jaynes for David Cary (Executor).

Ms. Jaynes stated that she filed the petition for approval of the status report. The Clerk noted that the hearing date is set for May 15, 2019. Status on close of estate is off calendar. The Court advised Ms. Jayne to have the inventory and appraisal filed by then.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Mar-06-2019 Text Ruling

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-06-2019 Continued To Mar-20-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jennifer Jaynes for and with David W. Cary (Executor). Brianna Mannion appearing for the San Francisco Public Administrator (SFPA).

The Court stated that the matter was on for reinstatement today and that the Executor had been derelict in his duties. Mr. Cary agreed with the Court's comments. Ms. Jaynes stated that Mr. Cary had hired her two weeks ago, that they have a partial accounting completed, that they can't get a date of death certificate until Mr. Cary is reinstated, and that they'd be happy to provide a status report. Ms. Jaynes also addressed the tangible personal property, stated that they need to get the Vanguard statements, that they will get a supplement to the probate referee, and that they are ready to work. At the conclusion of Ms. Jaynes comments, the Court reinstated David Cary as Executor (order signed). Ms. Mannion stated that the SFPA is happy to let Mr. Cary proceed as Executor. The Court continued the status hearing to March 20, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for the filing the Inventory & Appraisal and an official status report. The Orders to Appear are off calendar with the reinstatement of Mr. Cary as the Executor.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy K. Chan. Matter not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Mar-06-2019 Text Ruling
Ex Parte Petition For Order Reinstating Suspended Executor

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-06-2019 Continued To Mar-06-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court suspends the powers of David Cary as the Administrator of the estate. A copy of the order suspending the administrator's powers will be provided to the beneficiaries. Status on close of estate and the two orders to appear are continued to March 6, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-23-2019 Continued To Feb-06-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor to appear on February 6, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear and why the inventory and appraisal, and a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration have not been filed. Status on close of estate and the prior order to appear are also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jan-23-2019 Continued To Feb-06-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-09-2019 Continued To Jan-23-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator to appear on January 23, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear and why an inventory and appraisal, and a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration have not been filed. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate
